title: When will the writer see the play?

meanings.usage: 指在剧院上演的戏剧表演
用于进入剧院、电影院等的凭证
可指办公场所或服务机构
指把东西还给原主人或退回
用于肯定回答，表示同意
指戏剧、音乐等的演出活动
表示强烈的情感或惊讶
指紧随其后的时间或顺序

phrases.usage: 用于礼貌请求某物的句型

examples.en: May I have two tickets please?
examples.zh: 请问我可以买两张票吗？

phrases.usage: 表示歉意或遗憾的礼貌用语
表示遗憾或可惜的感叹句

examples.en: What a pity! The tickets are sold out.

phrases.usage: 询问是否可以退票的句型

examples.en: Can I return these two tickets?
I went back to the ticket office at once.

phrases.usage: 比May I更委婉的请求句型

examples.en: Could I have those two tickets please?
examples.zh: 请问我可以要那两张票吗？

phrases.usage: 不如；不妨（虽然不太理想但还是接受）

examples.en: I might as well have them.

examples.zh: 它们是下周三的演出票。

grammar.title: 情态动词 May/Might 表示可能性
grammar.definition: may和might用于表示某事可能发生，might比may更不确定
grammar.structure: 主语 + may/might + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于谈论当前或将来的可能性

examples.en: The play may begin at any moment.

grammar.title: 礼貌请求句型 Can/Could + 主语 + 动词原形
grammar.definition: 使用can或could来提出请求，could比can更委婉客气
grammar.usage: 用于向他人请求帮助或物品，could显得更有礼貌

examples.en: Can I return these two tickets?
Could I have those two tickets please?
examples.zh: 请问我可以要那两张票吗？

grammar.title: 情态动词 May 构成的一般疑问句
grammar.definition: 用may引导一般疑问句来礼貌地提出请求
grammar.structure: May + 主语 + 动词原形?
grammar.usage: 用于正式或礼貌的请求场合

examples.en: May I have two tickets please?
examples.zh: 请问我可以买两张票吗？

sentencePatterns.pattern: May I have + 物品 + please?

original.en: May I have two tickets please?
original.zh: 请问我可以买两张票吗？

imitations.en: May I have a glass of water please?
imitations.zh: 请问我可以要一杯水吗？

imitations.en: May I have your name please?
imitations.zh: 请问我可以知道您的名字吗？

sentencePatterns.pattern: Could I have + 物品 + please?

original.en: Could I have those two tickets please?
original.zh: 请问我可以要那两张票吗？

imitations.en: Could I have the menu please?
imitations.zh: 请问我可以看一下菜单吗？

imitations.en: Could I have your attention please?
imitations.zh: 请问我可以引起您的注意吗？

original.en: Can I return these two tickets?

imitations.en: Can I return the dress if it doesn't fit?
imitations.zh: 如果不合身我可以退货吗？

sentencePatterns.pattern: I might as well + 动词原形

original.en: I might as well have them.

imitations.en: Since it's raining, I might as well stay home.
imitations.zh: 既然下雨了，我不如就待在家里。

imitations.en: The food is already paid for, so I might as well eat it.
imitations.zh: 食物已经付过钱了，所以我不如就吃掉吧。
